# data.connection.Xhr: defaultHeaders config

@wemersonjanuario would like to get the ability to set headers for every neo based xhr call.

We already have something like this inside:
https://github.com/neomjs/neo/blob/dev/apps/realworld/api/Base.mjs#L33
